reviews.review_description:
S8 user here .

Game works flawlessly on S8 - graphics and game play are great and smooth.

I quite enjoy the artwork and graphics in this app and found myself becoming addicted quickly.

I am not usually a fan of these type of escape room games but this one kept me pleasantly entertained for some time.

The Neo Nour-ish, atmosphere was a nice touch.

I thought it was cool to see through Twobits eyes to help navigate and this is a very cool idea.

The developer did a great job on this unique game.

Highly recommemded!!

developer_response.body: Thanks Razorss! I spent a bit of time optimizing the game for the Gear VR and it now runs for hours without any overheating even on my s6! Thanks a lot for your amazing feedback! And there's a lot more to see, the eight levels are packed with unique features and tricks! I'm happy that you like it! :)

reviews.review_description:
Unique puzzler, get it!! 

Technically so well done, my GO remains cool (very rare occurrence) although the game looks beautiful! Sound is also great, use earphones to fully get immersed.
 But if 8 levels is really true then it might be too short.... Anyway:-)
Unique experience with much love to the detail!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your awesome feedback! I spent a lot of time optimizing the game so yes! It won't overheat your GO! (I do all my dev work on an S6!). Although the game features eight levels right now, they get more complex as the game progresses and deliver hours of gameplay! I may add more levels in the future if the game gains more traction. Thank you so much for your awesome feedback, I really appreciate it :)

reviews.review_description: Two-bit is such a cool little robot! Had a great time with him in a very atmospheric world. Can't wait to see what other adventures await!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! I'm so glad that you liked Twobit and his adventures :)
Thanks you so much Gilagassi1 for your awesome feedback! I'm so happy that you like the game! :)

reviews.review_description: I am a great fan of two-bit  I love the new puzzles.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback SuzAnne, and I am so happy to hear that you like the new rooms/puzzles :)

reviews.review_description: Adorably. Plays smoothly. I hate the timed games though. Overall love it

developer_response.body: Hi! Thank you for your great feedback! Only the boss levels are timed in order to add a little challenge and a feeling of urgency. I'm planning to add more levels in the future if people really like the game (although the current version has eight stages and hours of gameplay!). I'm really happy that you loved the game and found our little friend Twobit adorable :)

reviews.review_description: Exactly what you would want in vr, helping your little robot friend explore and escape his predicament. The game is both fun and beautiful, my only wish is that it also had the special gear motion controller support

developer_response.body: Thank your for your amazing feedback! I also LOVE the Gear VR motion controller and I will definitively add support for it in the near future (update! It is now supported and is fully compatible with the Oculus Go!).

reviews.review_description: This game I guess just wasn't for me . I didn't find it exciting or fun . Am I able to get a refund I bought it like maybe 30 min ago?

developer_response.body: I'm sorry to hear that you didn't like the game...  And of course, I believe you can ask for a refund within three days of purchase and if you have engaged with the content for no more than thirty minutes.

reviews.review_description:
Thanks again for the key! The game looks amazing!
But like others have said before, I do miss the controller support. Maybe I got spoiled by all the controller supported apps, but I can't help but feel like it's somehow a bit of a downgrade to not be able to use it anymore in this game. I think it could really improve the gameplay. Then maybe you wouldn't need to give Twobit the wait command to look around without accidentally sending him somewhere.
I also noticed that Twobit tends to try to go in a straight line and that it can take him quite a while to figure out how to go efficiently from A to B if something is blocking his path. Unfortunately this can be slightly less cute if the clock in the boss room is ticking :p
Overall I think it's really well done!

edit:
Is lvl 6 solvable? No matter how many times I try, I flood the level with lava and then I'm stuck. None of the buttons seem to do anything useful, just bash the big things on the lava, the timer keeps ticking and then I die... I tried it countless times and after all this time I'm still no closer to finishing the level. I'm going to reduce my rating, I'm sorry.

Tested on SM-N950F.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your great feedback! The game now supports the Gear VR Controller and is therefore compatible with the Oculus Go! Lvl 6 is solvable, yes! You have to crush the two robots in the room - to do so, activate the two large crushers (there are timed tiles nearby each one of them), then remote control the robots and place them under the crushers :)

I'm so sorry to hear that the game is not installing on S8 (it used to work fine). To tell you the truth, I'm not even sure how much Oculus supports the Gear VR anymore... please don't hesitate to ask for a refund if the install keeps failing. Again, I'm very sorry about this :(

reviews.review_description: Why do Devs assume all VR Lovers are fit,healthy and have either swivel chairs or rubber necks.How hard can it be to add a swipe/click to turn option on their games ?.Elderly users can't stand up turning around for any length of time and for wheelchair users (who can benefit the most from VR) game's like this are practically impossible to play.So come on devs take a leaf from the likes of Daedelus which is a joy to play sitting on a sofa ! More options for the physically challenged .Two it would get 5 stars from me if it had a turning option .it looks great but painfully for me to play.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! I've been working for a while on an option to rotate the view in the game, but it's been tricky to implement with the Go/GVR controller... I will revisit it and see if I can map something that would be easy to use. I'm sorry to hear that you had problems with the game because of it, I'll get to it soon :)

reviews.review_description:
Well Laurent.  Good job.  Fun vr experience.  Very polished graphics and easy to medium challenge.  Between 1 and 2 hours to complete.

I specially liked the level 8 where the is earth in the backround.  Music is also really nice.  I checked the end credit and your name appears everywhere :P   Very impressive.  

The only place i was stuck was beginning of level 7,  had to check the youtube tutorial and awwww.  :P
